title: R&D Categories
description: R&D Library のカテゴリ体系。パッケージ化できない多次元複雑系として設計。

core_concept.label_ja: パッケージ化できない多次元複雑系
core_concept.description: 単一階層に圧縮できず、複数軸で表現し、双方向リンクを持つ複雑系。
core_concept.description_en: A complex system that cannot be compressed into a single hierarchy, is expressed across multiple axes, and has bidirectional links.

academic.description: 学術分野（主軸）。生物学階層参考。
academic.description_en: Academic fields (main axis). Biological hierarchy reference.

frontier_topics.description: ブレイクスルー予測領域。

foundational_math.description: 純粋数学。R&Dと双方向共創。
foundational_math.description_en: Pure mathematics. Bidirectional co-creation with R&D.

nobel_prizes.description: ノーベル賞全部門の受賞者（1901-2025）。主な発見・代表的な方程式を記載。
nobel_prizes.description_en: Nobel Prize winners in all categories (1901-2025). Major discoveries and representative equations.

research_awards.description: 研究者格付けコンペティション。Nobel, Abel, Fields, Turing等。規模・インパクト順。
research_awards.description_en: Researcher ranking competition. Nobel, Abel, Fields, Turing, etc. Ranked by scale and impact.

major_awards_detail.description: Breakthrough, Nobel, Abel, Fields, Lasker の創設経緯・特徴・過去受賞者。
major_awards_detail.description_en: Founding history, features, and past recipients of Breakthrough, Nobel, Abel, Fields, Lasker.

institutions_index.description: 世界の予算・著名度の高い機関一覧。抜け漏れチェック用。
institutions_index.description_en: List of world's major institutions by budget and prominence. For coverage verification.
